## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's missing?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've tried.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, or links to similar implementations.
